items.title: Trump says US-Iran ceasefire still in place after exchange of fire in Strait of Hormuz
items.dek: Iran accuses the US of violating the truce, alleging it targeted an oil tanker and carried out attacks on coastal areas.
items.body: Iran accuses the US of violating the truce, alleging it targeted an oil tanker and carried out attacks on coastal areas.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: World Cup fans in China and India face broadcast uncertainty
items.dek: Broadcasters in the two countries have yet to reach deals with Fifa, just weeks before the tournament is due to start.
items.body: Broadcasters in the two countries have yet to reach deals with Fifa, just weeks before the tournament is due to start.
items.author: IriLine Desk
